behavior_summary: Provides a short examine description for a wall-mounted lamp via U8P_LAMP3::look (shows the text 'wall lamp').

Handles a U8P_LAMP3::use/activate action via U8P_LAMP3::use that inspects the lamp item's current frame and replaces the item with one of two alternate item types by calling FREE::changeItemType. This effectively toggles or swaps the lamp's placed variant (likely different orientation or on/off states).
Coordinate arithmetic (using Item::getX and Item::getY with +0x20 in one branch) is used to compute the placement coordinates for the replacement, while Item::getZ supplies the level.
notable_control_flow: U8P_LAMP3::look: linear flow — emit a single bark/string 'wall lamp' and suspend/end.
U8P_LAMP3::use: conditional branch on Item::getFrame(this) == 0x00; two distinct FREE::changeItemType calls are made depending on the frame value (different target coordinates and typeId).
open_questions: What semantic meaning does the byteFlag (0x00) argument to FREE::changeItemType have in this context?
Are the two typeIds (0x013A and 0x013D) representing 'on/off' states, orientation variants, or distinct decorative lamp models? This is inferred but not proven from the script alone.
Does the coordinate offset (+0x20 on X vs +0x20 on Y) correspond to rotation/placement rules in the engine or to two different attached tiles? (Likely, but uncertain.)

main_function.name: U8P_LAMP3::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short description shown when the player examines the wall lamp item.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the player performs a 'U8P_LAMP3::look' / 'examine' action on the lamp item (object inspection).

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP3::look
function_map.role: Examine handler that displays the short description 'wall lamp'.

function_map.name: U8P_LAMP3::use
function_map.role: Utility/U8P_LAMP3::use handler that swaps the placed lamp item to one of two type variants based on the item's current frame.

function_map.name: Item::getFrame
function_map.role: Query current item frame/state index used to choose replacement path.

function_map.name: Item::getX
function_map.role: Return item X coordinate used to compute replacement X (one branch uses X + 0x20).

function_map.name: Item::getY
function_map.role: Return item Y coordinate used to compute replacement Y (one branch uses Y + 0x20).

function_map.name: Item::getZ
function_map.role: Return item Z/level coordinate passed to changeItemType.

function_map.name: FREE::changeItemType
function_map.role: Replace or change an item at given coordinates to a specified item type id (applied here to swap lamp variants).

internal_calls.purpose: Terminate/suspend the U8P_LAMP3::look process after producing the description.
Select replacement path based on item frame (internal conditional control; represented here as internal branching rather than an external call).

external_calls.purpose: Read the lamp item's frame/state to decide which replacement variant to apply.
Obtain the item's X coordinate; used to compute X + 0x20 for one changeItemType call.
Obtain the item's Y coordinate; used to compute Y + 0x20 for the alternate changeItemType call.
Provide Z/level coordinate to FREE::changeItemType for replacement placement.
Replace the current lamp item with a specified typeId at computed coordinates, implementing the visual/functional swap.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides a short examine description for a wall-mounted lamp via U8P_LAMP3::look (shows the text 'wall lamp').
